description: ration for beginner Smart MUD play.
name: Ration
look_description: A wrapped trail ration suitable for a quick meal.
examine_description: Hard bread, dried fruit, and a strip of smoked meat are bundled in waxed cloth.

description: clean water flask for beginner Smart MUD play.
long_description: A small flask filled with clean water.
name: Clean Water Flask

examine_description: The flask is made from treated hide and sealed with a wooden stopper. It feels mostly full.

name: Torch

examine_description: The wrapped head smells of resin and should burn for a useful stretch of travel.
